name: Vorpal Sword
description: You gain a +3 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. In addition, the weapon ignores Resistance to Slashing damage.

decapitation.trigger: Attack creature with at least one head and roll 20 on attack
decapitation.death_condition: Creature dies if can't survive without lost head

immune_to_effect: Creature doesn't have or need head
DM decides creature too big for head to be cut off

legendary_resistance.effect: Can expend one daily use to avoid losing head
